# External Checkouts Context

This directory holds local third-party checkouts used as comparative reference material while maintaining this repository.

These checkouts are inputs for study, not maintained outputs. They are intentionally separate from `platforms/`, and they should not be treated as repo-owned assets to copy wholesale into downstream deliverables.

## Intended Use

- Review useful third-party skills, hooks, sub-agents, and adjacent configuration patterns.
- Learn how other repositories package platform-native assets.
- Adapt selected ideas into maintained outputs under `platforms/` when they fit this repository's goals and boundaries.

## Agent Guidance

- Treat content under `references/external/` as background context for synthesis.
- Preserve attribution and source awareness when discussing ideas learned from these checkouts.
- Write finalized repository-owned outputs under `platforms/`, not inside `references/external/`.
